reason: The downstream description adds an unsupported claim that the field contains 'payment gateway credentials' and 'API endpoint identifiers', whereas the source describes it as a routing identifier (MID/merchant ID/API key string), not a credential or endpoint.
proposed_fix: The protocol identifier string (MID, merchant ID, API key, etc.). This is the actual routing value passed to the payment processor. Examples: "18989693", "18986763" (Tier 1 - Billing.ProtocolMIDSettings.md)
